questions.prompt: She ____ coffee yesterday morning.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去時間，drink 的過去式是 drank。

questions.prompt: They ____ basketball after school last Friday.
questions.explanation: last Friday 表示過去時間，規則動詞 play 加 -ed。

questions.prompt: My father ____ to work by bus yesterday.
We ____ English last Tuesday.
Tom ____ TV last night.
questions.explanation: last night 表示過去時間，watch 加 -ed。

questions.prompt: I ____ breakfast at 7:00 yesterday.
The dog ____ in the park this morning.
You ____ very hard last week.
questions.explanation: last week 表示過去時間，work 加 -ed。

questions.prompt: Mary ____ her homework after dinner yesterday.
The students ____ to music in class yesterday.
questions.explanation: listen 是規則動詞，過去式是 listened。

questions.prompt: He ____ a new book last month.
questions.explanation: read 的過去式拼法仍是 read，但發音不同。

questions.prompt: My friends ____ in Taipei five years ago.
questions.explanation: five years ago 是過去時間，live 加 -d。

questions.prompt: The baby ____ a lot last night.
I ____ my room yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去時間，clean 加 -ed。

questions.explanation: cook 是規則動詞，過去式是 cooked。

questions.prompt: My sister ____ piano lessons last year.

questions.explanation: play 是規則動詞，過去式是 played。

questions.prompt: We ____ our grandparents last Sunday.
questions.explanation: visit 是規則動詞，過去式是 visited。

questions.prompt: She ____ her teeth before bed last night.

questions.explanation: ask 是規則動詞，過去式是 asked。

questions.prompt: The sun ____ at 6:00 this morning.
My parents ____ tea after dinner yesterday.

questions.explanation: clean 是規則動詞，過去式是 cleaned。

questions.prompt: Anna ____ Japanese very well last year.

questions.explanation: play 是規則動詞，過去式是 played。

questions.prompt: He ____ his mother last night.

questions.prompt: I ____ a diary last night.
The library ____ many old books before the fire.

questions.explanation: get up 的過去式是 got up。

questions.prompt: Sally ____ her hair this morning.
We ____ the bus to school yesterday.

My classmates ____ lunch in the cafeteria yesterday.

questions.explanation: check 是規則動詞，過去式是 checked。
